hooks.prompt:
Check if the changes made in this conversation turn require updating CLAUDE.md. CLAUDE.md documents: project structure (key directories), conventions (terrain types, object types, rendering approach), architecture overview, build commands, skills, and documentation links.

Specifically check if any of these happened:
1. New directories or key files were added/removed/renamed
2. New terrain types, object types, or other game concepts were added
3. Build commands or workflow changed
4. New skills were added to .claude/skills/
5. Architecture or conventions changed
6. New documentation files were added

If CLAUDE.md needs updating, respond with {"decision": "block", "reason": "CLAUDE.md needs updating: <specific changes needed>"}
If no update is needed, respond with {"decision": "allow"}
